steps.title: Use the dilation property
steps.content: A dilation changes side lengths but preserves angle measures. Since triangle $ABC$ is dilated to triangle $XYZ$, corresponding angles are congruent.

steps.title: Match the corresponding angle
steps.content: Vertex $A$ corresponds to vertex $X$. The diagram gives the measure of angle $A$ as $60^\circ$, so angle $X$ also measures $60^\circ$. The answer is C.
